subject: fix(theme): address audit findings — DRY, color-scheme, cleanup
body:
Fix 5 code issues found during CLAUDE.md compliance audit:

1. Extract getCSSColor to src/utils/cssColor.ts — eliminates duplication
   between cytoscapeStyles.ts and DebugPill.tsx (DRY violation)
2. Add root.style.colorScheme to useTheme hook — now all three layers
   (.dark class, data-theme, color-scheme) set explicitly by the hook
3. Add root.style.colorScheme to flash prevention script — prevents
   native form elements flashing in wrong color-scheme before CSS loads
4. Remove unused _isDark parameter from getCytoscapeStylesheet — colors
   read from DaisyUI CSS variables at runtime, parameter was dead code
5. Replace rounded-[3px] with rounded-sm in TimelineView — consistent
   with token-only approach

Tags: theme, audit, dry, cleanup, color-scheme
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
